sql_array: INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('hello abc=111 world');
SELECT extractGroups(s, '([a-z]+)\s=\s([0-9]+)') AS result FROM test_strings;
UPDATE test_strings SET s = 'new example test=222';
SELECT extractGroups(s, '([a-z]+)\s=\s([0-9]+)') AS result FROM test_strings WHERE s LIKE '%example%';
